<iframe srcdoc="<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <title>
      test
    </title>
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%20100%20100%22%3E%3Ctext%20y%3D%22.9em%22%20font-size%3D%2290%22%3E%F0%9F%A7%AA%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/css/style.css">
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/js/me_css.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/js/pointer_events.js"></script>
    <script type="module" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/js/highlight.js"></script>
    <script type="module" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/starfederation/datastar@main/bundles/datastar.js"></script>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="card surface" style="--hue-shift: 45; resize: both">
      <style>
    me { padding: var(--s); border-radius: var(--cfg-radius);
          height: 130px; aspect-ratio:2 ; display: grid; resize: both;}
    me > svg { width: stretch; height: stretch; }
    </style>
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none" class="sparkline">
        <polyline points="0.00,50.65 5.26,1.30 10.53,9.09 15.79,41.56 21.05,40.26 26.32,88.31 31.58,93.51 36.84,20.78 42.11,45.45 47.37,66.23 52.63,72.73 57.89,100.00 63.16,46.75 68.42,22.08 73.68,71.43 78.95,0.00 84.21,24.68 89.47,54.55 94.74,40.26 100.00,88.31" fill="none" stroke="var(--bg)" style="--color: 0.5; vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
      </svg>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>" style="width:stretch;height:100svh;border:0">

</iframe>

<iframe srcdoc="<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <title>
      test
    </title>
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%20100%20100%22%3E%3Ctext%20y%3D%22.9em%22%20font-size%3D%2290%22%3E%F0%9F%A7%AA%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/css/style.css">
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/js/me_css.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/js/pointer_events.js"></script>
    <script type="module" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Deufel/toolbox@latest/js/highlight.js"></script>
    <script type="module" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/starfederation/datastar@main/bundles/datastar.js"></script>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div>
      <div class="card surface">
        <style>
    me {
        padding: var(--s);
        border-radius: var(--cfg-radius);
        height: 150px;
        aspect-ratio: 3/2;
        resize: both;
        overflow: hidden;
        display: grid;
    }
    me > svg { width: stretch; height: stretch; }
    </style>
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none" class="sparkline">
          <polyline points="0.00,50.65 5.26,1.30 10.53,9.09 15.79,41.56 21.05,40.26 26.32,88.31 31.58,93.51 36.84,20.78 42.11,45.45 47.37,66.23 52.63,72.73 57.89,100.00 63.16,46.75 68.42,22.08 73.68,71.43 78.95,0.00 84.21,24.68 89.47,54.55 94.74,40.26 100.00,88.31" fill="none" stroke="var(--bg)" style="--color: 0.5; vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
</html>" style="width:stretch;height:100svh;border:0">

</iframe>
